# ADR-0004: Bad status

## Status

Aproved — 2026-01-08

## Context

Frontmatter `status` is `aproved`, not a valid status value for this dialect (accepted | proposed | rejected | superseded | deprecated). Seeded violation: malformed status (D1).

## Decision

N/A — fixture file.

## Consequences

N/A — fixture file.
